calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-11-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia M. Evezich. Joseph Alcordo Sacramento, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff Sergio Iantorno and Defendant Dean Taylor appeared in pro per. The case settled per oral stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2003 Text Ruling
